title: Understanding Frictional Work
text: To find the energy lost to friction, we need to calculate the work done by the frictional force. Work done by a force is given by the formula: $$work=force distance$$.

title: Finding the Distance
text: The distance the squid travels can be found using the formula: $$distance=velocity time$$. Use the velocity of the squid and the time given to find the distance.

title: Calculate the Distance
text: Given that the velocity of the squid is $$0.5$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$ and the time is $$0.1$$ s, calculate the distance traveled by the squid.

title: Calculate the Work Done
text: Now that you have the distance, use the work formula: $$work=force distance$$. The force is given as $$5.00$$ N.

title: Calculate the Energy Lost
text: Using the distance of $$0.05$$ $$m$$ and the force of $$5.00$$ N, calculate the work done against friction.
